# Progress Check

The Project Progress Check is an **optional bonus** opportunity that
gives you feedback on your project halfway through and rewards
progress.

## Outline (to be written)

- What the progress check is and isn't
- Which slides are graded (Title, Academic Honesty, Distribution of
  earnings by gender, Wages and hours differences, Career log wage
  profiles, Evolution of the gender wage gap)
- Scoring: 5 points (clean), 3 points (formatting clean / content
  error), 0 (formatting error)
- How to submit
- How feedback is provided

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is a stub. Content will be filled in as part of Wave 2
of the project rebuild.
:::
